fields.name: EN
fields.description: enable

fields.name: CACHEINV
fields.description: cache invalidation Set by software and cleared by hardware when the BUSYF flag is set (during cache maintenance operation). Writing 0 has no effect.

fields.name: WAYSEL
fields.description: cache associativity mode selection This bit allows user to choose ICACHE set-associativity. It can be written by software only when cache is disabled (EN = 0).

fields.name: HITMEN
fields.description: hit monitor enable

fields.name: MISSMEN
fields.description: miss monitor enable

fields.name: HITMRST
fields.description: hit monitor reset

fields.name: MISSMRST
fields.description: miss monitor reset

fields.name: BUSYF
fields.description: busy flag

fields.name: BSYENDF
fields.description: busy end flag

fields.name: ERRF
fields.description: cache error flag

fields.name: BSYENDIE
fields.description: interrupt enable on busy end Set by software to enable an interrupt generation at the end of a cache invalidate operation.

fields.name: ERRIE
fields.description: interrupt enable on cache error Set by software to enable an interrupt generation in case of cache functional error (cacheable write access)

fields.name: CBSYENDF
fields.description: clear busy end flag Set by software.

fields.name: CERRF
fields.description: clear cache error flag Set by software.

fields.name: HITMON
fields.description: cache hit monitor counter

fields.name: MISSMON
fields.description: cache miss monitor counter

fields.name: BASEADDR
fields.description: base address for region x This alias address is replaced by REMAPADDR field. The only useful bits are [28:RI], where 21 less than or equal RI less than or equal 27 is the number of bits of RSIZE (see ). If the programmed value has more LSBs, the useless bits are ignored.

fields.name: RSIZE
fields.description: size for region x

fields.name: REN
fields.description: enable for region x

fields.name: REMAPADDR
fields.description: remapped address for region x This field replaces the alias address defined by BASEADDR field. The only useful bits are [31:RI], where 21 less than or equal RI less than or equal 27 is the number of bits of RSIZE (see ). If the programmed value has more LSBs, the useless bits are ignored.

fields.name: MSTSEL
fields.description: AHB cache master selection for region x

fields.name: HBURST
fields.description: output burst type for region x
